subcodes.first_line: O thou who art yearning for the Beloved of all horizons! Among lovers and seekers there are many claimants, but to the threshold of the Beloved [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای مشتاق محبوب آفاق عاشقان مشتاقان یعنی مدعیان بسیار ولکن بوثاق معشوق
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual prerequisites of teaching the Cause, @knowledge; recognition of God, @thankfulness; gratitude
